title: HALLIDAY INSURANCE AGENCY LIMITED — Revocation of a Licence
text:
A notice of revocation of licence was issued to Halliday Insurance Agency Limited pursuant to sections 38(1)(a) and 38(4) of the Financial Services Commission Act, 2001, for its contravention of section 57(1) of the Insurance Act, 2008, the Financial Services Commission (Fees) Regulations, 2010 and its failure to fulfill all requirements to be approved for voluntary cancellation of its licence pursuant to the Guidance Notes for the Revocation or Cancellation of Licences or Certifications, including Approval of Solvent Liquidation Procedures.
